opportunities.title: EIC Accelerator 2025 — Open Call
opportunities.description: EIC Accelerator supports individual SMEs and startups to develop and scale up breakthrough innovations. Open to all tech domains including AI, cybersecurity, and deep tech. Slovak companies are eligible.

opportunities.title: EIC Pathfinder Open 2026
opportunities.description: EIC Pathfinder Open funds visionary research on radically new technologies. No thematic restrictions — AI foundations, quantum, advanced cybersecurity architectures are all eligible.

opportunities.title: Horizon Europe — Cybersecurity Cluster 3 Call 2026
opportunities.description: Cluster 3 'Civil Security for Society' covers cybersecurity research including AI-driven threat detection, secure digital infrastructure, and privacy-enhancing technologies. Consortium of 3+ EU entities required.

opportunities.title: NGI Search Cascade Funding — Open Call #3
opportunities.description: NGI Search cascade grants for SMEs and researchers developing next-generation search, data sovereignty, and AI-powered information retrieval solutions. Fast-track, lightweight application process.

opportunities.title: Slovak Innovation Vouchers — SIEA 2026
opportunities.description: Innovation vouchers for Slovak SMEs to collaborate with research institutions on technological innovation, including AI and digital transformation projects.

opportunities.title: SKIT — Slovak AI & Cybersecurity Scale-up Grant
opportunities.description: SKIT supports Slovak deep tech startups scaling AI and cybersecurity products. Co-financing up to 85%. Eligible costs include R&D, talent, and market entry.

opportunities.title: Eurostars — Call 2026/S2
opportunities.description: Eurostars supports R&D-intensive SMEs in international collaborative projects. Slovakia is a member state. Projects in AI, security, and deep tech are consistently funded.
